{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Mountain's Fist Enforcer
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Mountain's Fist Enforcer]] is a technique used by those on the [[Path of Rolling Earth]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
